CVE-2025-23249.title: NVIDIA NeMo Framework contains a vulnerability where a user could ...
CVE-2025-23249.summary: NVIDIA NeMo Framework contains a vulnerability where a user could cause a deserialization of untrusted data by remote code execution. A successful exploit of this vulnerability might lead to code execution and data tampering.

CVE-2025-23250.title: NVIDIA NeMo Framework contains a vulnerability where an attacker  ...
CVE-2025-23250.summary: NVIDIA NeMo Framework contains a vulnerability where an attacker could cause an improper limitation of a pathname to a restricted directory by an arbitrary file write. A successful exploit of this vulnerability might lead to code execution and data tampering.

CVE-2025-23251.title: NVIDIA NeMo Framework contains a vulnerability where a user could ...
CVE-2025-23251.summary: NVIDIA NeMo Framework contains a vulnerability where a user could cause an improper control of generation of code by remote code execution. A successful exploit of this vulnerability might lead to code execution and data tampering.

CVE-2025-23304.title: NVIDIA NeMo library for all platforms contains a vulnerability in ...
CVE-2025-23304.summary: NVIDIA NeMo library for all platforms contains a vulnerability in the model loading component, where an attacker could cause code injection by loading .nemo files with maliciously crafted metadata. A successful exploit of this vulnerability may lead to remote code execution and data tampering.

CVE-2025-23360.title: NVIDIA Nemo Framework contains a vulnerability where a user could ...
CVE-2025-23360.summary: NVIDIA Nemo Framework contains a vulnerability where a user could cause a relative path traversal issue by arbitrary file write. A successful exploit of this vulnerability may lead to code execution and data tampering.
